pages.text: Jets push riders through $(bold)any water$(), not just slide blocks. Build a watertight glass tube of any size — 2x2, 4x4, a whale — flood it, line it with Jets, and it's a slide.$(br2)Filling by bucket is misery. Use a $(item)Flood Valve$().
Give it redstone and RF: signal ON fills the sealed space it faces; signal OFF drains it.

If your build isn't watertight, the valve refuses and $(bold)points at the leak$() — smoke rises at the hole and the coordinates land in your action bar. Patch it and flip the lever again.$(br2)$(bold)Right-click the valve$() any time to read its mode, power, sealed volume, or leak spot.
pages.title: Finding leaks
